form.formComment: Strong performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 400m (23.19) beating Project Nemesis in Maiden on April 4. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Strong performance to win by 2.5 lengths at this track over 400m (23.19) beating Project Nemesis in Maiden on April 4. Has hit winning form and can measure up again.

form.formComment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 16.24, beating She's A Bird. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Savina beaten 4 lengths (23.25). Solid showing expected.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Did a good job two starts back at this track to win by one length in 16.24, beating She's A Bird. Last start finished 4th in a Grade 5 on April 2 over 400m at this track behind Savina beaten 4 lengths (23.25). Solid showing expected.

form.formComment: A speedy beginner who is back up to 400m which has been an issue in the past. Last appeared when fourth over 300m at Taree Super Track three days ago. Capable of a good showing.

formComments.title: TAB

form.formComment: Latest effort finished 6th over 400m at Maitland beaten 8 lengths (23.16) behind Magic Wylde in a Grade 5 on April 6. Capable of a strong show.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Latest effort finished 6th over 400m at Maitland beaten 8 lengths (23.16) behind Magic Wylde in a Grade 5 on April 6. Capable of a strong show.

form.formComment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 7 over 388m at Gosford in a Grade 5. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Backs up after finishing 7th on April 7 over 388m at Gosford in a Grade 5. Doesn't profile as a likely winner.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Came together through the first turn and lost momentum.

form.formComment: Good effort last time when third (23.45) over 400m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Good effort last time when third (23.45) over 400m at this track. Looks tested in this line-up.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Checked off the heels in the back straight and lost ground.

form.formComment: Failed to finish the race over 400m at this track last start. Prior to that was beaten 19 lengths over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Will need to improve to feature.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Failed to finish the race over 400m at this track last start. Prior to that was beaten 19 lengths over 400m at this track in a Grade 5. Will need to improve to feature.

form.formComment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 5.5 lengths second at this track but did record a decent 22.85 over the 400m journey. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Snuck into the minor money last time when a 5.5 lengths second at this track but did record a decent 22.85 over the 400m journey. Hard to top with a repeat of that run.

form.formComment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 388m at Gosford. Prepared to risk this time.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Has not shown much in recent runs. Could only manage eighth last time out over 388m at Gosford. Prepared to risk this time.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Heels galloped on through the first turn, stumbled and lost momentum.
Made contact with the running rail rounding the turn into the front straight.

form.formComment: Has a maiden win to her credit but has been finding it hard to feature subsequently. Last raced when sixth over 388m at Gosford two-and-a-half weeks ago. Must be included.
